reasoning: For 2025-11-16, the FIDE ranking list on Wikipedia will be identical to 2025-11-09 since FIDE lists and the page update only monthly (on the 1st of the month). Thus, the rank will be mathematically equal, which qualifies as 'as high or higher' (P ~0.93). For 2025-12-09, the Dec 1 list will reflect the November World Cup results. Wesley So's shocking Round 2 exit against unheralded Titas Stremavicius guarantees a significant Elo drop given So's high rating, dropping him in rank below rising players (P ~0.25). For 2026-02-07, the Feb 1 list will reflect early 2026 events such as Tata Steel, giving him a fair chance to regain his Elo and former rank via mean reversion, although starting from a deficit (P ~0.45). Uncertainty appropriately increases with time.
